storyInfo: Hoshiguma crosses paths with Tessai's estranged son, Tetsuya, as well as Kichisei, a longtime resident of Kajimachi. Momoka, meanwhile, gets herself into even bigger trouble when her refusal to let her show tarnish Kajimachi's reputation backfires.

attributes.content: Hello, madam. I don't think I've seen you in Kajimachi before. What's your name?
attributes.name: Well-Dressed Young Man

attributes.content: Do you need something? Some stranger ransacked my house. I need to go clean up.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You haven't heard the news? It seems that someone snuck across the northern border, into Mitsukue.
attributes.name: Well-Dressed Young Man

attributes.content: My name is Tetsuya Sorimachi. I'm a member of the Kinsekikai. Please tell me who you are. I know everyone here in Kajimachi, and I've never seen you here before.
attributes.name: Well-Dressed Young Man

attributes.content: Tetsuya? Could it be...?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No. No way.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I'm going home, Tetsuya.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Home? Don't be ridiculous. Do you even know the story behind this haunted house?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: This was the home of the First Chairman of the Kinsekikai, and his clinic too. He was the best doctor we ever had. He saved countless lives.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: After he passed away, the house went to his daughter.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Are you claiming to be his daughter?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Hold on... you're pretty tall, you have a single horn, and look at your hair... is that really you, Hoshiguma-aneki?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Aneki? Tetsuya, you—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: —The Haunted House kaidan is about you?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: I never died. I never disappeared. I never became a kaidan. I just went to Lungmen; that is all.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Who can verify the truth of what you're saying?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Go ask Uncle Tessai.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I have nothing to say to that man.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Oh? You're with Kinbee? Then go ask him about it. Don't bother me. I'm going to pay my respects to my father.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Come talk to Mifune-san with me. You can return home after we've sorted this out.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: I politely refuse.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The young man takes out the wooden bokutou hanging from his waist and points it at Hoshiguma.
Upon seeing that his weapon is a blade made of wood, Hoshiguma lets out a sigh of relief. She sets down Hannya and faces Tetsuya, bare-handed.
Have we met?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Never.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Do you really think you can beat me with a bokutou?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I've heard the story of the 'Ao-Oni of Kinsekikai' before.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: So you...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Tetsuya? You're picking another fight? Last time you provoked someone, it almost became an actual sword fight. Haven't you learned your lesson?
This is none of your business, Kichisei. Mifune told me to watch out for strangers. I need to take this woman to see him.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: She doesn't look like an easy mark to me. Why are you——
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Why are you picking fights with ghosts?!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: You know her?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: She popped up yesterday onstage during the concert and nearly scared Momoka half to death.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: She's really a ghost?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: No. What kind of ghost runs from, and then gets caught by, the cops? Did you somehow break out of jail, or were the cops unable to hold you?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: They let me go, thank you very much.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hmph. Boring.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Calm down, Tetsuya. Don't always take Mifune as the supreme authority.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: I know you hate your father and don't wanna go home. But at least try to carry yourself with a little decency. Or else all Kajimachi is gonna treat you like the plague.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Kichisei!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: So Uncle Tessai... remarried? And he gave you the same name as his first son?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: He... treats you and your mother poorly?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Before, when we used to fight, I would ask him why he married my mother.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: His first wife and son were killed, along with your father. Then the girl he had raised like his own daughter suddenly went missing. He was supposed to die alone, so why did he have to drag my mom into it? Why did he have to ruin our lives too?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Hoshiguma stares at the young man, who is staring back at her through his mask. She realizes he is not looking at her like an enemy...
*Sigh*
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: What are you sighing about?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Nothing. I'm just tired.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Don't lie to me!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: The young man adopts a fighting stance and attempts to close in on Hoshiguma at a tricky angle.
Hey!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: What kind of... empty-hand disarm technique is this?!
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: You read too many mangas. This is the most basic of basic grappling techniques.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Did you settle down yet?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: The young man doesn't answer. Even though she's peering through a mask, Hoshiguma can clearly see that the young man looks a bit depressed.
You were all fired up just a moment ago. No need to give up so quickly. If your skills aren't up to par, just train harder.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Who says I'm giving up? How... how can you tell that I'm...?
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: Forget it.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: So what really happened between you and Uncle Tessai?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You can't ask me that question, Hoshiguma-aneki.
attributes.name: Tetsuya

attributes.content: The young man hooks the bokutou back at his waist. He wants to wave goodbye, but can't bring himself to do so.
After standing there for a moment, he gives Hoshiguma a stiff nod and limps off towards the outskirts of town.
Ahem, Ghost-san?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: My name is Hoshiguma.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Hoshiguma, Tetsuya may be stupid, but he's not evil. He only started working for Mifune because he had a falling out with Old Man Tessai.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Lately, rumors have been flying about someone from the Northern Court sneaking into Mitsukue. Mifune probably decided he was too annoying and sent him to wander the city, telling him to go catch the northern spy, and he actually took it seriously.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: This morning, Kinbee killed one of his minions here in Kajimachi, for the crime of trespassing.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Tetsuya is Uncle Tessai's son. I hope Kinbee doesn't go lop his head off too.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: You look awfully young, Kichisei. What brings you to Kajimachi?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I inherited my grandmother's shop, the Lucky Star. Old Man Tessai's pachinko parlor is under it, so I help him mind his shop too.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: You can handle two jobs at the same time like that?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: *Shrugs* Ever since that bastard Mifune announced he was redeveloping Kajimachi, no one really comes by anymore. So I have plenty of free time.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: What do the residents think of the redevelopment plan?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Huh? Mifune doesn't give two shits what the locals think.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: His people don't usually mind 'trespassing into Kajimachi.' Some people come to stir up trouble, while others come to drive people out. We're powerless to stop them. Even Old Man Tessai can't keep them in check.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: The Old Man's only been able to hold them off because he's got the deed to Kajimachi and is still the titular head of the Kinsekikai. Otherwise, Mifune would've taken it long ago.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Thanks for sharing all that.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No need to thank me. If you do end up moving back here, we'll be neighbors. Good neighbors help each other.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: By the way, what were you calling Mifune... Kinbee?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: That was his name before he hit it big.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Oh. Okay. Then that's what I'll call him from now on.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Oh, but, Ghost-sa——err... Hoshiguma-san, I really want to know more about you. Is the kaidan legend true? Did you really hunt and kill on a mission of vengeance twenty years ago?
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Sorry, I don't have time to talk about that right now. I got a lot to do.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Sure, whatever. You go do your thing. I'll be right there in the pachinko parlor. Come find me if you have time.
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Oh, by the way. I'm heading to the shrine to pray for Momoka tomorrow, and then there's the fireworks festival the day after that. So don't come either of those two days, since I'll be out!
attributes.name: Kichisei

attributes.content: Fireworks festival?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: I guess... it is fireworks season.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Momoka sits in a cramped little room, in front of a plant that doesn't look particularly healthy.
It looks like a few more of your leaves have gone yellow. Well, at least you have a few new leaves to balance those out.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: There's not enough sunlight in this room. Your stem keeps bending towards the window... ugh.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Please don't die, Hasuke.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Next to the plant, there is a whole row of baffling objects, arranged from right to left.
An empty water tank, a few flower pots filled with soil but no plants, a climbing frame for cloudbeasts, and in the middle—a tiny electronic terminal, so small that its purpose is indiscernible.
And on the far left, there is a tightly sealed gym bag. There's no way to tell what's inside.
As Momoka reaches for the watering can, the phone rings.
Mio-san...?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Is this Momoka?
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: Producer?!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka, the TV station's ratings are through the roof, all thanks to your visit to that haunted house. Why aren't you the least bit excited? Have you not watched it yet, or...?
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: I was scared of that ghost thing before I ever agreed to do it. I hope I never see it again. That ghost...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The ghost didn't touch you!
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: Every major station is broadcasting your new show right now, and the forums are full of discussion about the Oni—some have even created dedicated threads to revisit your past episodes!
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: I was actually worried about your career trajectory for a while, but now I can finally relax. You're practically guaranteed to become the Southern Court's Kaidan Queen.
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: But...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Alright, well. The advertisers are blowing up my phone with endorsement offers for you. I'd better take some calls!
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: Momoka, dejected, looks back at the room. She fixes her gaze on the television.
Kajimachi is haunted! There are narrow old alleys, rundown shopping streets, and streetlights no one's even bothered to repair...
attributes.name: Voice on TV

attributes.content: Oh no, no...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: (Presses channel button to change the channel)
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The vicious Oni has returned, all because of the countless wrongful deaths in Kajimachi!
attributes.name: Voice on TV

attributes.content: With no one daring to even set foot in Kajimachi, what future lies ahead for the neighborhood?
attributes.name: Voice on TV

attributes.content: (Mashes channel button)
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Popular entertainer Momoka faces life-threatening danger in Kajimachi. Local businessman Mifune-san speaks out——
attributes.name: Voice on TV

attributes.content: 'On behalf of the Kinseki Group, I vow that we will fix Kajimachi's problems at their core.'
attributes.name: Voice on TV

attributes.content: Why did it blow up like this? Usually people watch the show, laugh a little, and move on.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Why did this episode provoke such a reaction? I promised Kichisei I'd do my part for Kajimachi, but if things keep going like this…
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: What do I do now...?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Momoka takes a look at the forums. She doesn't even need to scroll to see her name. Every thread is about her.
No. I'm the cause of all this. I need to respond positively...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Will you support me, Hasuke?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Hasuke says nothing.

attributes.text: Hello everyone. I am Momoka Hanyuu.
I have an announcement to make... regarding that TV show I did in Kajimachi.
You all know that I filmed my first movie in Kajimachi.
There was a time when lot of the people who lived there... walked the path of the yakuza... so disputes break out from time to time.
Now there are fewer and fewer people there. There's just a few quiet old streets. It's not a scary place at all...

attributes.content: ...and.... post!
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: (Deep breath)
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Interacting with fans is usually so easy. Why am I so nervous this time...?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: I hope I can help Kichisei and Kajimachi... hehe.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Let's just put the Kaidan Queen stuff aside for now.
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Look at how many likes it's getting. Hehe...
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: Huh? What happened? Why did it get grayed out?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: The phone rings again.
Who could it be...?
attributes.name: Momoka

attributes.content: She runs to the phone and picks up the receiver.
Hello? Momoka?
attributes.name: Mio

attributes.content: It's clearly Mio's voice on the other end. Mio, who is usually cold, sounds like she's struggling to keep her emotions in check.
Before Momoka can even respond, someone else comes on the line.
Aho ka! Stupid girl, have you lost your mind? What are you doing posting like that?
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: We've already locked the post. It looks bad for us to delete it here from the system. You have to delete it yourself, now!
attributes.name: Producer

attributes.content: *Huff* That's... all I have for now.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: 'All you have'? It's a giant mountain!
attributes.name: Worried Recycler

attributes.content: If I'd shown up a little earlier and filmed you cleaning out the Haunted House and posted it to the intercity net… who knows, maybe it would've gone viral. Could've made us a bit of cash.
attributes.name: Worried Recycler

attributes.content: Now? My shift's almost over, and you bring a heaping pile of garbage over... *sigh*
attributes.name: Worried Recycler

attributes.content: This is just the trash from the first floor and the courtyard. There's more on the second floor and in the basement.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Uh oh.
attributes.name: Worried Recycler

attributes.content: Anyway, please take my money. Otsukaresama desu.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Alright, fine... Wait. A koban coin?
attributes.name: Worried Recycler

attributes.content: You don't use kobans anymore? Or you can't make change?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: How long have you been away? We switched to paper currency ages ago. Actually, I've heard that Mitsukue and Kusarikawa want to eliminate cash all together.
attributes.name: Worried Recycler

attributes.content: That koban must be worth around four thousand mon. I can't make change for it, and even if I could, I wouldn't dare accept it as payment. Who knows if it's even real?
attributes.name: Worried Recycler

attributes.content: Uh...
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Here's your money.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Woah, Tessai Oyabun!
attributes.name: Worried Recycler

attributes.content: Arigatou gozaimasu. I'll have someone haul this away then.
attributes.name: Worried Recycler

attributes.content: The recycler pulls out his terminal and begins dispatching vehicles and personnel, while Tessai and Hoshiguma remain standing by the trash heap. Neither of them appears ready to leave.
The evening air is thick and humid. As Hoshiguma looks at the trash heap, her thoughts return to Lungmen.
If it was Missy standing here with me, she would've already dragged me back to her place by now, she thinks.
And if it was Ch'en Hui-chieh, she would've rolled up her sleeves, without saying a word, and started hauling trash from the basement and second floor.
If it was 'Lin Gray' or his daughter... I mean, they would never have even let the house become haunted in the first place.
The old man beside her remains silent. The garbage truck arrives, gets loaded up with trash, and then rumbles away.
Did you find any of your father's things while cleaning out the house?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: I searched the whole first floor but didn't find anything.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Uncle Tessai, I just ran into a young man named Tetsuya—
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Come stay with me. This place is too messy. It'll take you days to clean it up.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: That's okay, I'd rather stay here in my own home.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Fair enough. I'll go and get you some clean sheets.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Otsukare, Uncle Tessai.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: As Tessai slowly walks away, Hoshiguma turns her gaze to the empty backyard.
When her father died, Mitsukue still hadn't completely recovered from the chaos of the Bloodpeak Campaign.

In accordance with the old customs, she had her father cremated. She buried his ashes in the backyard. Also, she erected a marker, made of the finest wood, and implored Tessai to carve the inscription.

When she came to clean out the backyard, all these years later, she found the wooden marker was still standing firm, even amidst all the garbage. She's been so busy cleaning up that she hasn't had time to tend to the grave yet.
Ao-Oni-san? You're Ao-Oni-san, aren't you?!
attributes.name: Slick Reporter

attributes.content: Hey, everybody! Come over here! We have to get footage of this! It's a huge discovery! The Ao-Oni from the kaidan is here in Kajimachi!
attributes.name: Slick Reporter

attributes.content: We come to you this evening from Kajimachi, Mitsukue with an amazing discovery——the Ao-Oni!
attributes.name: Slick Reporter

attributes.content: After twenty years, the legendary Ao-Oni of Kinsekikai, has returned! We caught a glimpse of her yesterday at the concert on Nita Street, and now she stands here before us!
attributes.name: Slick Reporter

attributes.content: Is she a master mimic? A ghost wandering this mortal coil? A cold-blooded killer who's been silently stalking Mitsukue for twenty years, leaving a trail of bodies in her wake?
attributes.name: Slick Reporter

attributes.content: She doesn't look like a ghost... Ghosts don't usually have physical bodies... or cast shadows! Look. The Ao-Oni standing before us is casting a shadow! Hello! I'm Komatsu, from Kinseki Channel.
attributes.name: Slick Reporter

attributes.content: Hmph.
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Where's your unicycle?
attributes.name: Slick Reporter

attributes.content: My what?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Many people think the Ao-Oni is somehow related to the Wanyuudou! A bunch of the Oni's victims met... considerable misfortune right after spotting that fiery wheel—I think...
attributes.name: Slick Reporter

attributes.content: Before the reporter finishes speaking, Hoshiguma turns around and begins walking toward the house, only to bump into another hurried reporter.
More and more reporters gather round, like Originium slugs that have smelled leftover food in the sewer.
She's here! Finally! It's the Ao-Oni! It's really her!
attributes.name: Pretentious Reporter

attributes.content: Ao-Oni-san! My name is Urakami! May I ask why you've chosen to reveal yourself again after twenty years? Is it because all your grudges have finally been settled?
attributes.name: Hypocritical Reporter

attributes.content: Did you have anything to do with Momoka's show going viral?
attributes.name: Hypocritical Reporter

attributes.content: Get out of my way!
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: Ao-Oni-san! I just want to ask you a few questions—
attributes.name: Slick Reporter

attributes.content: Gugh—
attributes.name: Slick Reporter

attributes.content: You're actually striking people?
attributes.name: Slick Reporter

attributes.content: Kajimachi is still my private domain. You have trespassed. Have you thought about how you might make amends to the Kinsekikai?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Tessai?!
attributes.name: Hypocritical Reporter

attributes.content: This old man is stubborn and mean—and he'll really throw hands… Let's get out of here! No need to go head-to-head with him!
attributes.name: Hypocritical Reporter

attributes.content: What was a gaggle of reporters quickly scatters.
These vultures catch a whiff of 'news' and they come swarming in the blink of an eye. Kaidan? What kaidan?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: The people living in this house had a run of bad luck, and somehow that got tied to you—and then that evolved into a kaidan… ridiculous.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: I've got your sheets here, and your drink.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Drink?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: It's so late that even the street peddlers have left for the night. You're going to pay your respects to your father... how can you do that without any sake for him?
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: Arigato. Will you come with me, Uncle Tessai?
attributes.name: Hoshiguma

attributes.content: No. You go by yourself. You're his only daughter. I haven't taken good enough care of you. I can't show my face to him.
attributes.name: Tessai

attributes.content: If I can reforge Hannya, that will be how I make it up to him.
attributes.name: Tessai
